title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Allen Career Institute - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Allen Career Institute family as a Curriculum Developer in Kochi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Allen Career Institute:
Allen Career Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Educational Technology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Allen Career Institute!
